name: Indoor Golf RVA - Rocketts Landing
about: Indoor Golf RVA is a 24/7 golf club featuring industry-leading Trackman simulators. It offers a space to play, practice, and improve with technology used by 86 of the top 100 golfers on tour. The venue provides access to over 400 courses and a variety of membership options to fit different schedules and budgets, with a focus on being accessible to all levels of golfer.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to Trackman 4, the most advanced launch monitor in the golf industry
24/7 access allowing for flexible practice and play times
Variety of membership levels to fit any budget and schedule
Personal coaching available using Trackman technology
Faster play times than traditional golf (1 hour for 18 holes)

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB (Bring Your Own Food) is allowed, with references to bringing guests and enjoying food.
BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) is allowed, with references to bringing guests.

simulator_hardware.notes: The most advanced launch monitor in the golf industry, used by 86 of the top 100 golfers on tour.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state whether you need to bring your own clubs. It mentions they have a pro shop and club fitting services, which suggests rentals may be available, but this is not confirmed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Yes, you are allowed to bring your own food and beverages to Indoor Golf RVA.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take on the simulator?
faq.answer: A typical 18-hole round takes approximately 1 hour per person in your group.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific information about child-friendly features or policies. They mention 'juniors' in the context of special lesson pricing, but do not elaborate on general amenities for children.
